overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark, rocky forest trail at night, rendered in a game engine. The player moves cautiously along a narrow dirt path between large rock formations and sparse vegetation, illuminated by a flashlight or torch. The atmosphere is tense and exploratory, typical of survival horror or adventure game footage.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest path with large boulder wall

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along a narrow dirt path beside a large rock wall, flashlight illuminating the immediate ground ahead

entered.detail: tall curved rock formation with layered sedimentary texture running alongside the path
narrow winding trail with patches of grass and leaves
scattered boulders and stumps on the left side of the path
dark silhouettes of trees and dense undergrowth in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, narrow forest trail at night. A large rock wall dominates the right side of the frame, while scattered rocks and dark forest vegetation appear on the left. The camera moves steadily forward along the dirt path, illuminated by a focused light source.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested rocky trail with emerging trees

events.description: small pine trees become visible growing along the right side near the rock wall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path, passing small trees growing at the base of the rock face

entered.detail: small evergreen tree growing at the base of the rock wall
large boulder formation visible ahead in the distance

segments.scene_description: As the path continues, small pine trees emerge along the right side at the base of the rock wall. The small rocks on the left fall behind as the camera advances. The trail curves slightly, revealing a large rock outcropping ahead in the darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between large boulders entering darker area

events.description: path enters a darker, more enclosed section between rock formations with reduced ambient light

agents.ego_description: approaching a dark narrow gap between rock walls, flashlight beam illuminating the confined passage ahead

entered.detail: narrow shadowy gap between large rock formations ahead
smaller rock formation appearing on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail leads into a darker, more confined area between massive rock formations. The rock wall on the right draws closer as the path narrows. A dark passage looms ahead, creating a sense of entering a cave or enclosed canyon, while the pine trees are left behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark forest trail that gradually tightens into a confined rocky passage. It begins on a narrow dirt path flanked by a dominant rock wall on the right and scattered vegetation on the left, all illuminated by a focused light source. As the camera advances, small pine trees emerge at the base of the wall while the open terrain on the left falls away, leading the viewer toward a large rock outcropping. The scene then shifts as the trail curves and narrows, drawing the massive rock formations closer together. Finally, the path leads into a dark, enclosed passage that resembles a cave or canyon, leaving the forest greenery behind for a sense of total confinement.
